subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaiden of God! Though thou bearest a diminutive name, in truth thou art exalted. Were it not that thou art of slight frame and stature [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی اگر چه بنام کوچکی ولی بحقیقت جلیل اگر جسیمه و قسیمه نبودی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement
